creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
removing the DEBUG option fixed this for me.

I apparently had both DEBUG and FASTDEBUG set, and they don't work
together.

Mayhaps the port should whine?

Thanks Jung-Uk Kim for the pointer.
